opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I rolled my ankle stepping off the curb, and it's throbbing right on the outside bone. It happened about two hours ago and I'm worried I've broken something.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on straight after I twisted my ankle and I'm anxious there might be a hidden fracture — I want to know if I need an x-ray tonight or whether I can manage it at home.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, right after I rolled my ankle inwards stepping off a curb
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last couple of hours
symptom_narrative.character: a throbbing, aching pain over the outside bone of the ankle; mild
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: fairly mild — annoying rather than severe, I can still get around
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the outside of my right ankle, over the bony bit
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there the whole time, not really coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting with my leg up and putting a bag of frozen peas on it helped a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: turning my ankle inwards, and putting my full weight on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a little swelling but not much; no bruising that I can see
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I could still walk home on it, just carefully and with a bit of a limp

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a two-storey home and is a bit worried about managing the stairs, though there are sturdy handrails

objective_data_offered.value: only a little bit of swelling on the outside of the ankle, and I can't really see any bruising
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual impression over video; swelling can be hard to judge and may increase over the first day

objective_data_offered.value: I was able to stand on it and take steps to walk home, limping a little but bearing weight
I put a bag of frozen peas on it for about 10 minutes before I called
